# Capitals

Capital cities of the world — a document-like (shape-1) collection. Each record carries
**country**, **population**, **founded** (inherited from `base-place`), and **continent**.
Cross-link related cities with `[[capitals/...]]`.

## Data

| Record | country | population | founded | continent |
| --- | --- | ---: | ---: | --- |
| [Kyoto](kyoto.md) | Japan | 1463723 | 794 | Asia |
| [Seoul](seoul.md) | South Korea | 9417796 | -18 | Asia |
| [Tokyo](tokyo.md) | Japan | 14094034 | 1457 | Asia |
